params.TriggerDescription: As CARDNAME enters, you and an opponent each secretly choose Whack or Doodle. Then those choices are revealed. If the choices match, CARDNAME has that ability. Otherwise, it has Buzz. • Whack — {T}: Target player loses 2 life. • Doodle — {T}: You gain 3 life. • Buzz — {2}, {T}: Draw a card.
